narrative:
Whiteoak Township has 829 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
